meaning: n.统治者,管理者,尺,直尺n.标尺,划线板,划线的人
examples: The ruler cracked and splintered into pieces.
The former military ruler of Lesotho has been placed under house arrest.
Excuse me, is this your ruler?
That, plus personal ties, led Pakistan's former ruler Pervez Musharraf to come knocking in 2006.
But its military ruler, General Sani Abacha, has done none of the things demanded of him.
